ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., soil, water, human gut) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomic_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic rank */,
  "rank_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxonomic rank (e.g., superkingdom, phylum, class, order, family) */,
  "rank_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the taxonomic rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Weighted UniFrac error, Unweighted UniFrac error, L1 norm error) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_taxon_metrics" (
  "sample_taxon_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample taxon metric */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxonomic rank */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the sample and taxonomic rank */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_taxon_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_taxon_metrics_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES taxonomic_ranks ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_taxon_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_taxon_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "sample1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first sample in the comparison */,
  "sample2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second sample in the comparison */,
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxonomic rank for the comparison */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric for the comparison */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., pairwise, multiple) */,
  "comparison_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_sample1_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample1_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_sample2_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample2_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("rank_id") REFERENCES taxonomic_ranks ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "sample_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxon_metrics_values" (
  "taxon_metric_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon metric value */,
  "sample_taxon_metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample taxon metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_metric_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxon_metrics_values_sample_taxon_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_taxon_metric_id") REFERENCES sample_taxon_metrics ("sample_taxon_metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_results" (
  "comparison_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison result */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)
